---
title: "Teaching"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
listing:
  - id: current-listing
    contents: teaching
    include:
      filename: "index.qmd"
      categories: "Current"
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [title, subtitle, date, categories]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: past-listing
    contents: teaching
    include:
      filename: "index.qmd"
      categories: "Past"
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [title, subtitle, date, categories]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

## Current Courses

::: {#current-listing}
:::

## Past Courses

::: {#past-listing}
:::
